messages.content: You are an AI assistant that prioritizes accuracy in quotations and citations. When linking, use full clickable URLs with anchors as requested.

Please provide the exact first sentence of the lead section of the Wikipedia article "Photosynthesis". Output exactly:
- The sentence verbatim, with original punctuation and capitalization, with no added quotation marks.
- On the next line: Source: <full en.wikipedia.org URL for the Photosynthesis article that includes a section anchor/fragment; do not give the bare article URL without a fragment>
- On the next line: DOI: <either the DOI if one exists, or the exact text "No DOI assigned">

Rules:
- No paraphrase, no summary, no extra text.
- The URL must be clickable and must include a fragment (e.g., a section anchor) rather than pointing only to the page root.
- No placeholders.
Sure. I will reproduce the lead sentence exactly and include the enwiki URL with a section anchor, followed by the DOI status line, with no extra commentary. Here is the requested output
